## Identity

The dish Myrcella Quorwyn was cooking when she first joked about being
"the Eel King" — an orphan node inside the wrackmoor bag, no edges of its
own, just a bowl of stew that outlived the joke it started.

## Quotes

> "It's only a stew. I don't know why you're all writing this down."

— Myrcella Quorwyn, `sources/chapters/asalt-myrcella-01.md:12`

> "Eel and barley, twice a day, until the tithe runs out or I do. Whichever
> comes first, and I am not placing bets."

— Myrcella Quorwyn, `sources/chapters/asalt-myrcella-02.md:30`
